results.title: Seoul stocks spike over 4% on sustained tech rally
results.description: Seoul stocks spiked by more than 4 percent on a tech rally following Alphabet's second-quarter earnings release. The Korean won rose against the US dollar. The benchmark Korea Composite Stock Price Index closed up 299.19 points, or 4.4 percent, to 7,096.89. Trade volume was moderate at 392.3 million shares worth 26.7 trillion won ($18.2 billion). results.title: Historic 800-year-old French château near Lyon for sale for €3.8 million
results.description: An 800-year-old French château near Lyon in Isère has gone on the market for €3.8 million. The listed historic estate includes 19 bedrooms, medieval ramparts and potential for tourism and events.

results.title: Ratan Tata's Will Faces Complications Over Share Ownership Dispute
results.description: The execution of Ratan Tata's will has hit a snag due to a dispute over the ownership of 833 Tata Sons shares. This issue has led to an investigation by the Maharashtra charity commissioner, preventing the transfer of 3,368 shares to philanthropic foundations. While the Tata Trust maintains that the original transfer was lawful, the executors are currently unable to proceed until the investigation concludes. This situation not only complicates the transfer of shares but also adds uncertainty to Ratan Tata's substantial estate, valued at approximately Rs 10,000 crore, which includes various personal assets and investments.
